notes: Solid structure but stories lack specificity. Subject lines too generic. Awareness transitions feel mechanical.

Strong curiosity hooks in subject lines. Story about the dentist who automated his practice resonated. Trust building through insider stories works. Awareness escalation needs sharper transitions between emails 4-5.
Over-relied on Abraham-style strategic language. Too dense for email. Lost the reader in abstractions. Subject lines lacked Mueller-style curiosity gaps.
Mutation targeted story_engagement and awareness_escalation from Run 1B. Added concrete case study in email 3. Schwartz picture words improved email 2 and 4. Subject lines maintained strength.
Trust building improved via Kurtz generosity framing but story engagement dropped. Too much giving, not enough narrative tension.
Tried pure Mueller curiosity approach. Great opens but awareness escalation stalled at email 4. Reader stays Solution Aware too long.

Mutation targeted trust_building and awareness_escalation from Run 2A. Added Kurtz insider story in email 3, Schwartz awareness bridge in email 5. The 'invisible assembly line' metaphor in email 4 created strong Product Aware transition. Sequence arc tightened.
Strong trust and arc but story engagement dipped in emails 2-3. The consultant anecdote felt forced. Abraham preeminence positioning in email 6 was excellent.
Great stories but subject lines regressed. Trust building needs more Kurtz-style generosity. The mechanic analogy in email 5 was strong.

Mutation targeted open_rate_potential from Run 3A. Subject lines rewritten with Mueller curiosity gaps plus Schwartz specificity. 'The 11-minute meeting that replaced a $74K employee' crushed it. Core sequence maintained strength from Run 3A.
Equal avg to 4A. Story engagement peaked with the 'broken conveyor belt' narrative thread. Different strengths - kept as alternate for final comparison.
Trust building regressed when removing Kurtz insider framing. Sequence arc lost cohesion in emails 5-7 transition.

Final mutation combined 4A subject lines with 4B story threading. Added Kurtz generosity reveal in email 5. Schwartz awareness ladder now seamless across all 7 emails. Abraham preeminence CTA in email 7 feels earned, not salesy. Every email ends with a forward-looking hook that creates anticipation for the next.
Very strong but story engagement in emails 3-4 not as tight as 5A. The awareness escalation plateaus briefly at email 4.
Great stories throughout but subject lines slightly less punchy than 5A. Trust building good but lacks the insider revelation that made 5A's email 5 so powerful.
